title: US Marines Execute High-Risk Raid Near Iran, Then Withdraw
summary: US Marines conduct high-risk raid near Iranian waters before pulling back. Operation underscores rising regional tensions. Questions arise over implications for Strait of Hormuz security.
contents:
US Marines launch high-risk raid near key waters close to Iran. Forces pull back after operation, spotlight escalating confrontations. Deployment highlights vulnerabilities in strategic maritime zones.

Tensions surge with Iran over nuclear program and Hormuz access. US maintains blockade, rejects Iranian overtures. Marines' actions signal heightened readiness.

CENTCOM prepares strike options as Trump reviews plans. Admiral Brad Cooper briefs president today on targeted attacks. Iran mobilizes IRGC forces in response.

Regional fallout includes Hezbollah clashes in southern Lebanon. IDF strikes dozens of sites, destroys depots and command centers. Troops uncover rocket positions and booby-trapped explosives.

Israel pushes strict deadline for Lebanon talks via US channels. Officials demand Trump approval for campaign expansion if no deal by mid-May. Northern border threats persist.
